title: How can i make a new contact from a form submission
excerpt: Our organization has a volunteer sign-up form where we collect contact info from prospective volunteers. We’d like to find an automation that creates a new Contact card with each new form submission. I tried to set one u…

posts.author: culturehousecc (CultureHouse)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our organization has a volunteer sign-up form where we collect contact info from prospective volunteers. We’d like to find an automation that creates a new Contact card with each new form submission. I tried to set one up, and it works fine except that each new contact is called “Incoming form response” and I have to manually type in the person’s name. Is there a way around this?

Thanks!

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @culturehousecc,

You need to include the “Name” column in your form.
In the Form View, go to settings and check the “Include name question in form” checkbox
